p.seg: John, by the grace of God abbot of Lindores, and Henry, by the same grace prior of St Andrews, and [blank space], prior of Lindores, to the whole body of Christ’s faithful people to whom the present written document might come, Eternal salvation in the Lord:
May all of you come to know that

since, by a mandate of the lord Pope, a certain case was set in motion between the abbot and convent of Dunfermline and Master Richard the rector of the church of Hailes on the one side, and the abbot and convent of Holyrood on the other, over the teinds of the Craigs of Gorgie, at length, with the consent of the parties, the dispute moved between the parties was amicably laid to rest, that is,

that the foresaid abbot and convent of Dunfermline, and Master Richard, the rector of the said church of Hailes, for themselves and their successors in perpetuity renounced the foresaid dispute in this form, that is, that the foresaid abbot and convent of Holyrood, for the sake of peace, shall each year give one bezant or two shillings at the feast of St Martin for the lights to be found in the church of St Cuthbert in Hailes, and so all controversies between the churches of St Cuthbert in Hailes and St Cuthbert beneath the Castle in Edinburgh shall cease in perpetuity.

We, the Judges Delegate, have confirmed and strengthened by the corroboration of our seals this foresaid amicable agreement by the authority of the lord Pope, by which we have been engaged at the time of this agreement, together with the seals of our venerable father the bishop of St Andrews, and of his chapter, and the seals of the abbot and convent of Dumfermline, and the seal of Master Richard the rector of the said church of Hailes.

As witnesses, Hugh the bishop of Dunkeld, Master Lawrence the archdeacon of St Andrews, Master Matthew the chancellor of the lord king, William del Bois the archdeacon of Lothian, Ralph Niger the dean of Lothian, Master Peter of Ramsay, Gilbert of Stirling and Andrew the clerks of the lord king, Richard and Hugh the clerks of William del Bois, and many others.
